title: Define Tree Structure
text: Define Tree Structure Specify the hierarchical structure of items in the Tree widget. Use New and Delete to add or remove tree items from the tree. Use the arrow buttons to move tree items in the tree structure. Fields Icon Level Identifier Item Text Tree Item Type Role How to Defining Tree Widgets Defining and Updating ValRep Lists for the Tree Widget Related Links utree (Tree) The utree widget enables users to view and navigate structured data as a hierarchy. Uniface provides a logical widget called Tree, which is mapped to utree. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
